errors._comment: Server-error i18n seam (issue #94): keys here are matched against ApiError.code via translateApiError(). When the server emits a stable `code`, add its translation here; otherwise the server's human-readable message is shown verbatim. These are illustrative mappings — extend as the server starts emitting codes.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests — please slow down and try again.
